block_02: We would like to take a moment to highlight important changes to IQ Option’s trading schedule during the upcoming Bank holiday in the UK on the passing of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II.
block_03: For your convenience, changes to the trading schedule are mentioned below. All times are in UTC.
block_11: Note: The FX Options market will open as usual, but may close early depending on market conditions.
block_12: Note: Binary and Digital Options markets will operate as usual. Depending on market conditions, Over-the-Counter (OTC) assets may become available for trading.
